industry: Independent Power and Renewable Electricity Producers
name: Ocean Sun AS
summary: Ocean Sun AS develops floating power system with solar panels. Its system consists of one or multiple floaters anchored side-by-side to build larger power plants, as well as takes local water depth, wave, current, and wind conditions into consideration. The company has a strategic partnership with GCL System Integration. Ocean Sun AS was founded in 2016 and is headquartered Fornebu, Norway with locations in Singapore; Shanghai, China.
